goal: Compare RMSNorm vs LayerNorm on a 2-layer Transformer for CIFAR-10 image classification: hypothesis is RMSNorm achieves comparable accuracy with lower computational cost. Use small ViT (patch_size=4, dim=128, 2 heads), 3 seeds, 5 epochs, 2000 training samples. Measure accuracy, training time, and parameter count. Paired t-test for statistical comparison.
